rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0001
rows.name: They found an alien mobile weapon?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0002
rows.name:
Yeah. Looks like it belongs to an unknown
species. It's a type we've never seen before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0003
rows.name:
It seems to have been abandoned.
I want to recover it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0004
rows.name: That stirs a mechanic's blood![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0005
rows.name: Right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0006
rows.name: It's located here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0007
rows.name:
Deep in Nightglow Forest[ST:wide ]― So
that's why Lu was called.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0008
rows.name: Exactly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0008_2
rows.name:
The concern is that Growth also
seems to be after this thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0009
rows.name:
Judging by the FrontierNet readings, they've
already failed to recover it many times.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0010
rows.name:
That figures. Even I can't
get close to that place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0011
rows.name: There must be some special reason.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0012
rows.name: Yes. Praedo live there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0013
rows.name: Seems like these things are the cause.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0014
rows.name:
We didn't see them when we went
to Nightglow Forest before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0015
rows.name:
Yes. These creatures live deep within
the forest[ST:wide ]― in only a very small area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0016
rows.name:
And that place can no
longer be called a forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0017
rows.name: Why's that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0018
rows.name:
These creatures devour every life
form other than themselves.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0019
rows.name: Th-Then will Tatsu get eaten too, mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0020
rows.name:
Yes. In a few minutes, not
even bones will remain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0021
rows.name:
As the old saying goes, [System:Ruby rt=Leaving no trace behind ]'A
departing bird leaves no trace'.[/System:Ruby][ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0022
rows.name:
I see. So that's why Growth
keeps failing, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0023
rows.name:
But if that information is
accurate, that works in our favor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0024
rows.name: True, since our bodies are B.B.s.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0025
rows.name:
Looks like even Praedo, which react
to life forms, might overlook us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0026
rows.name: I understand the circumstances, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0027
rows.name:
You've already reported this
to Commander Vandham, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0028
rows.name:
Our top priority mission should
be searching for the Life Point.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0029
rows.name:
Even setting that aside, is recovering
this mobile weapon so urgent?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0030
rows.name: Of course.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0031
rows.name:
I came because Commander Vandham
told me to have Elma's team help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0032
rows.name: Like Elma says, we don't have time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0033
rows.name:
Finding the Life Point is the
top priority, no doubt, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0034
rows.name:
But now, the existence of
hostile forces is clear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0035
rows.name:
Plus, they seem to be part of
the group that attacked Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0036
rows.name:
And now those guys are desperate
to secure this thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0037
rows.name:
Does that mean it's extremely
important to them?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0038
rows.name:
What if this thing is a secret
weapon that could annihilate us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0039
rows.name: That seems like a bit of a leap, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0040
rows.name: Alright.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0041
rows.name:
Whatever it really is, the
fewer threats, the better.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0042
rows.name: Count us in.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0042_2
rows.name: Are we clear, everyone?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0043
rows.name: No, ma'am![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0044
rows.name: Alright, it's settled![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0045
rows.name:
But if we're going to take this on,
we should get it done quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0046
rows.name: Understood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0047
rows.name: Lu-san and Tatsu, you two stay here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0048
rows.name: Unlike us, you'll be targeted by Praedo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0049
rows.name: Ohh, thank you for your consideration.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0050
rows.name:
Lin-san, you do care about
Tatsu after all, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0051
rows.name:
Of course! Since I've been
steadily fattening you up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0052
rows.name:
I can't stand the thought of
Praedo eating you first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06050100_MSG0053
rows.name: Mo-mo-mo-mo![ST:wait ]
